name: starter
//: This example depends on @deskmate/core + deskmate via workspace:* SOURCE, so their dist/ must be compiled before `build` runs — hence vercel.json's buildCommand prefixes `pnpm -w run build:packages`. A REAL consumer installs the PUBLISHED packages (compiled dist already in node_modules) and just runs `deskmate sync && eve build`, which is exactly this `build` script.
